Class SlicedBread

java.lang.Object
entity.base.BaseItem
entity.base.BaseIngredient
entity.ingredients.SlicedBread
All Implemented Interfaces:
IceCreamable
public class SlicedBread extends BaseIngredient implements IceCreamable
Represents sliced bread ingredient.

  • Method Details

    • addIceCream

      public void addIceCream(IceCreamFlavor flavor)
      Set ice cream flavor of IceCreamable ingredient. Will not set if ingredient already contained ice cream.
      Specified by:
      addIceCream in interface IceCreamable
      Parameters:
      flavor - Ice cream flavor to be set

    • getIceCreamFlavor

      public IceCreamFlavor getIceCreamFlavor()
      Get ingredient's ice cream flavor.
      Specified by:
      getIceCreamFlavor in interface IceCreamable
      Returns:
      Ice cream flavor.
